payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. First GitHub login now provisions a real served board via createProjectBoard (project row + owner membership + seeded workspace.init) instead of the orphan projects row. Lifecycle: PATCH /api/projects/:id rename (updates the projects row AND emits workspace.set into the board history), DELETE = soft archive (archived_at; data retained; replica evicted; archived boards excluded from listings and session defaults). Schema upgrade is a conditional, advisory-locked ALTER.
